
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>afiche</title>

<style>
html, body{
    margin:0;
    padding:0;
    width:100%;
    height:100%;
}

iframe{
    width:100%;
    height:100vh;
    border:none;
}
</style>

</head>
<body>

<iframe src="afiche.pdf"></iframe>

</body>
</html>
